title: Ravishing Date-Night British Mentaiko Rice Bowl
description: A rich and creamy rice bowl dish featuring smoky mentaiko and perfectly cooked British seafood, perfect for a romantic evening in.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over low heat.
Add the unsalted butter and cook, stirring occasionally, until it starts to break down and turn golden brown.
Add the mentaiko and cook, stirring constantly, until it's heated through and beginning to flake apart.
Add the smoked haddock and cook, stirring occasionally, until it's cooked through and flaked.
Stir in the scotch whisky and cook for 1 minute.
Stir in the lemon juice and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked rice to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Season the mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture to a bamboo-tray and garnish with chopped green onions and dried parsley.
Serve the Ravishing Date-Night British Mentaiko Rice Bowl immediately and enjoy.
